ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the tournament */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the tournament's logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tournament (e.g., 'Upcoming', 'Ongoing', 'Completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country represented by the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current coach (foreign key to the 'coaches' table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "match_number" INTEGER /* Unique number for the match within the tournament */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tournament (e.g., 'Group Stage', 'Round of 16') */,
  "result" TEXT /* Final result of the match (e.g., '1-0') */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main referee (foreign key to the 'match_officials' table) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Current status of the match (e.g., 'Scheduled', 'In Progress', 'Completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES match_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the team */,
  "possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession by the team */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the team */,
  "corner_kicks" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "offside" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "crosses" INTEGER /* Number of crosses */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the goalkeeper */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Percentage of accurate passes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (e.g., 'Right', 'Left') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played in the match */,
  "substitute_in" INTEGER /* Minute the player was substituted in (if applicable) */,
  "substitute_out" INTEGER /* Minute the player was substituted out (if applicable) */,
  "yellow_cards_issued" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards issued in the match */,
  "red_cards_issued" INTEGER /* Number of red cards issued in the match */,
  "total_passes" INTEGER /* Total number of passes made */,
  "accurate_passes" INTEGER /* Number of accurate passes */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "career_start" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's career */,
  "career_highlights" TEXT /* Career highlights of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the match official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the match official (e.g., 'Referee', 'Assistant Referee') */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the official */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the official */,
  "career_start" TEXT /* Start date of the official's career */,
  "career_highlights" TEXT /* Career highlights of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_official_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the official is assigned to */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match official */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the official's role in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_official_assignments_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_official_assignments_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES match_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'analyst', 'coach', 'admin') */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
